title: Michelle Villagran | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Michelle Villagran is an experienced immigration attorney at Colombo & Hurd, where she focuses on employment-based immigration, consular processing, and adjustment of status cases. With nearly a decade of exclusive immigration law practice, Ms. Villagran has successfully represented clients in complex matters before U.S. immigration authorities.
Ms. Villagran earned her Juris Doctor from Barry University School of Law, where she developed a passion for immigration law through her work at the Barry Law Immigration Clinic, assisting low-income clients with legal challenges. She also holds a bachelor’s degree in business management from the University of Central Florida.
Fluent in both English and Spanish, Michelle is committed to delivering personalized, strategic legal representation to each of her clients, ensuring their immigration process is as smooth as possible.
Her personal connection to immigration drives her deep understanding of the challenges her clients face. Michelle is a member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association and the Hispanic Bar Association of Central Florida. Outside of her practice, she enjoys listening to music and cooking new dishes.
